source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The \( pV \)-diagram in \textbf{figure} shows a cycle of a heat engine that uses 0.250 mol of an ideal gas with \( \gamma = 1.40 \). Process \( ab \) is adiabatic. (a) Find the pressure of the gas at point \( a \). What is the thermal efficiency of the engine?
